page: Microsoft Azure E64-32ds_v4 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the EDSv4 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor operating at 2.6 GHz. The configuration includes 16 physical cores and 32 dedicated vCPUs with hyper-threading enabled. It is equipped with 504.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 15.75 GB per core. Additionally, the server includes 2458 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable.

Performance benchmarks position this instance as a strong performer in memory-bound operations. It achieves a strong rating in large-block memory write bandwidth at 94.63 GB/sec and a strong Passmark memory score of 2874.76. CPU performance is stable, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 29805.05 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 10861.0. For specialized workloads, it demonstrates strong performance in text generation for small language models (135M) at 283.02 tokens/sec, though it shows limitations on larger models, processing 70B model prompts at a weaker rate of 5.54 tokens/sec.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E64-32ds_v4 offers a high density of memory relative to its compute resources, making it a qualitatively efficient choice for memory-intensive applications that do not require proportional scaling of vCPU licenses. The combination of 504.0 GB of RAM, a 2458 GB local disk, and Premium Storage capability makes this server highly suitable for large relational databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise applications, and data analytics workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure E64-32ds_v4 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the EDSv4 family, running on Microsoft Hyper-V. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor featuring 16 physical cores and 32 dedicated vCPUs running at 2.6 GHz. The server stands out for its substantial memory capacity of 504.0 GB, providing 15.75 GB of RAM per core, alongside 2458 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. Benchmark data highlights strong memory write bandwidth of 94.63 GB/sec and a strong Passmark memory score, alongside average CPU performance. This configuration is highly efficient for memory-intensive workloads that benefit from high resource density without requiring excessive compute scaling. It is well-suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64-32ds_v4 is an EDSv4 virtual machine featuring 32 vCPUs, 504 GB of RAM, and 2458 GB of local storage, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and database applications.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64-32ds_v4 is a memory-optimized VM with 32 vCPUs, 504 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage, running on Intel Xeon processors.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized virtual machine featuring extensive local storage and strong memory write bandwidth for demanding enterprise database workloads.

504.0 GB of system memory providing 15.75 GB of RAM per core
2458 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
